extraction.one_line_summary: KRON Andreas won Stage 6 sprint after COSTA Rui disqualified for irregular sprint behavior, despite Kron experiencing illness setbacks earlier in race week.
tactical_patterns: KRON recovered from mid-race illness period post-Catalunya to deliver sprint win, suggesting fitness can rebound within single stage race.
Commissaires intervened in sprint finish with disqualification, indicating sprint behavior crossed boundaries in leftward drift from right side start.

rider_signals.KRON Andreas: positive: Won despite hard day previous stage and illness setbacks after Catalunya, showing resilience within stage races.
rider_signals.COSTA Rui: negative: Disqualified from sprint win for irregular positioning, moved excessively left from right-side sprint initiation.
